references.role: structural Licorn kitchen context for all segments
references.prompt: Preserve cabinet layout, terrazzo material, and lighting only; not a mandatory wide camera.

references.role: island hero stacking and final cake context
references.prompt: Light terrazzo island for mixer, stack, and outro.

references.role: overhead prep, level, pipe, and dust views
references.prompt: Overhead terrazzo for milk swirl and decoration.
Close baked layer macro in oven context.
Stand mixer for batter and buttercream.
Whisk silhouette for prep and peaks.

references.role: blush rose milk swirl color and vein
references.prompt: Four-layer vanilla rose cake with pale blush buttercream rosette border on a white cake stand, 15 cm diameter, intact and motionless on Licorn terrazzo. Generate one vertical 9:16 still of rose powder blooming in a 12 cm glass of milk: pale blush spiral vein, vanilla bean flecks, satin surface, macro food-porn lighting on terrazzo, no character.

Generate one vertical still of thick glossy pale ivory cake batter ribbon falling from a stand mixer paddle into a 24 cm bowl on light terrazzo, satin ribbon 2-3 cm thick, not chocolate, not baked, Licorn macro lighting, no character.

references.role: pale smooth batter in 15 cm pan
references.prompt: Generate one vertical still of pale smooth cake batter filling a parchment-lined 15 cm round pan two-thirds full on terrazzo, matte surface, not baked, Licorn lighting, no character.

references.role: golden domed 15 cm layer before leveling
references.prompt: Generate one vertical still of a golden domed vanilla cake layer 15 cm diameter in a round pan, fine velvety edge, springy top, warm bake color, not a cupcake or loaf, Licorn oven-warm lighting, no character.

references.role: flat 15 cm disk 2 cm thick stack-ready
references.prompt: Generate one vertical still of a leveled golden vanilla cake disk 15 cm diameter and 2 cm thick on a cooling rack over terrazzo, even edge, no dome, not oversized, Licorn macro lighting, no character.
Generate one vertical still of pale blush rose buttercream glossy peaks on a whisk over terrazzo, pipeable satin texture, not hot magenta, not greasy split, Licorn macro lighting, no character.

Generate one vertical still of a partial three-layer vanilla cake stack on a white cake stand on terrazzo, 15 cm diameter, blush buttercream between layers, fourth layer not yet placed, Licorn food-porn lighting, no character.

references.role: wedge slice showing four sponge layers
references.prompt: Generate one vertical still of a wedge slice removed from a 15 cm four-layer vanilla cake revealing even sponge layers and pale blush buttercream bands, clean cross-section, on terrazzo, Licorn macro lighting, no character hands.

references.role: finished dish identity for hero and outro
references.prompt: Four-layer vanilla rose cake with pale blush buttercream and piped rosette border on a white cake stand, 15 cm diameter, intact with no missing wedge, motionless on the Licorn terrazzo island. Generate one vertical 9:16 hero still: four even golden sponge layers visible only at top edge, smooth blush shell, simple rosette border, food-porn composition, warm Licorn kitchen lighting, no character.
